notes: Reddit r/PokemonTCG community study, n=5000 packs, rates as relayed by ThePriceDex: holo rare 1/5.6 (17.86%), V 1/12.7 (7.87%), VMAX 1/23.7 (4.22%), ultra rare 1/25.0 (4.00%), rainbow rare 1/96.2 (1.04%), secret rare 1/100 (1.00%). All hits modeled in the rare slot with residual mass on non-holo rare; reverse filler approximated as a 50/50 common/uncommon split. Confidence medium: large sample but figures read via a secondary aggregator. packSize excludes the basic Energy and code card. ETB SWSH era = 8 packs.
